# asim_vendors_products.csv

**Generated by:** [`collect_asim_fields.py`](../collect_asim_fields.md)
**Granularity:** One row per allowed (vendor or product) value
**Type:** ASIM schema reference

## Overview

The list of allowed `EventVendor` and `EventProduct` values extracted from the ASIM documentation. ASIM parsers should set these fields to one of the listed values to keep normalized data consistent.

## Use Cases

- **Parser-authoring validation** — verify that a parser's `EventVendor` / `EventProduct` assignment is in the allowed list.
- **Vendor/product enumeration** — show users the canonical list of supported vendors/products in the ASIM browser.

## Columns

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `type` | `vendor` or `product` |
| `value` | The allowed vendor or product name |
| `doc_url` | URL to the ASIM doc page where the value is listed |

## Related CSVs

- [`asim_fields.csv`](asim_fields.md) — `EventVendor` / `EventProduct` are fields therein, but their allowed-value enumeration lives here rather than in `asim_logical_types.csv`.
